name: SkillBar
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or extend SkillBar, the codex-goated-skills macOS menu bar manager. Use when Codex needs to work on the `apps/skillbar` workspace, validate repo-driven catalog parsing, exercise install or update wiring through `bin/codex-goated`, or keep the local preset, pack, and installed-state flows honest.
short_description: Build and refine the goated skills and pack menu bar manager
default_prompt: Use $skillbar to work on SkillBar, the macOS menu bar manager for codex-goated-skills, including the catalog UI, preset bundles, repo pack browsing, metadata parsing, install or update flows, and repo catalog or integrity checks.
